# Native Protocol

> Programmable liquidity protocol for token swaps, cross-chain bridges, and orderbook data across Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, and Base.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#readme): Full documentation — install, configure, usage, architecture
- [Quick Start](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#quick-start): Install, configure API key, first quote
- [Configuration](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#configuration): CLI config, environment variables, precedence rules
- [Usage](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#usage): Token swaps, orderbook, cross-chain bridges
- [For AI Agents](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#for-ai-agents): JSON output, exit codes, structured metadata
- [MCP Server](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#mcp-server): Setup for Claude, Cursor, and MCP-compatible clients
- [Error Handling](https://github.com/Dylanwooo/native-cli#error-handling): API error codes, CLI exit codes, troubleshooting

## API

Base URL: `https://v2.api.native.org/swap-api-v2/v1`

- `GET /indicative-quote` — non-binding price quote
- `GET /firm-quote` — binding quote with transaction calldata
- `GET /orderbook` — liquidity depth by pair
- `GET /widget-tokens` — supported token list (no auth required)
- `GET /bridge/indicative-quote` — cross-chain price estimate
- `GET /bridge/firm-quote` — cross-chain swap calldata
- `GET /bridge/tx-status` — bridge transaction tracking
- `GET /bridge/tx-history` — bridge transaction history by wallet

## npm Package

- [nativefi-cli on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/nativefi-cli): `npm install -g nativefi-cli`

## Supported Chains

- Ethereum (chain ID: 1)
- BNB Smart Chain (chain ID: 56)
- Arbitrum One (chain ID: 42161)
- Base (chain ID: 8453)

## MCP Tools

### No API key required
- `native_search_docs`: Search protocol documentation
- `native_get_examples`: Browse code examples (TypeScript, Python, bash, JSON)
- `native_list_tokens`: List supported tokens by chain

### API key required
- `native_get_quote`: Indicative swap price quote
- `native_get_swap_quote`: Firm quote with transaction calldata
- `native_get_orderbook`: Real-time orderbook depth
- `native_bridge_quote`: Cross-chain bridge quote
- `native_bridge_swap`: Cross-chain bridge with calldata
- `native_bridge_status`: Bridge transaction status
- `native_bridge_history`: Bridge transaction history by wallet
